0.text: Pleuroparenchymal scarring densities with calcification in the bilateral upper lobe apicoposterior segments, more prominent on the left

2.text: Secretions in the bronchi of the middle lobe of the right lung

3.text: Subcentimeter nodule, possibly a lymph node, in the major fissure of the right lung

4.text: Multiple subcentimeter nodules in both lungs

5.text: Multiple calcified nodules in both lungs
